ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer (M/F) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "active" TEXT /* Status of the customer (Yes/No) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Current vaccination status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "vac_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "vac_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vaccination center is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vaccination center is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the vaccination center is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the center */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the center */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "dr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "dr_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the doctor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or practice address of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consultations" (
  "consult_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consultation */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being consulted */,
  "vac_id" TEXT /* ID of the vaccination center where the consultation took place */,
  "dr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who performed the consultation */,
  "consult_dt" TEXT /* Date and time of the consultation */,
  "consultation_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the consultation */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the consultation */,
  "prescription" TEXT /* Prescribed medications or treatments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consult_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consultations_vac_id FOREIGN KEY ("vac_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("vac_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consultations_dr_id FOREIGN KEY ("dr_id") REFERENCES doctors ("dr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consultations_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vacc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "consult_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consultation where the vaccination was administered */,
  "vacc_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination */,
  "vacc_dt" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccination_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the vaccination */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_consult_id FOREIGN KEY ("consult_id") REFERENCES consultations ("consult_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_vaccinations" (
  "cust_vacc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer vaccination */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the vaccination */,
  "vacc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Current status of the vaccination */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_vacc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_vaccinations_vacc_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacc_id") REFERENCES vaccinations ("vacc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_vaccinations_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the customer record */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being accessed */,
  "access_dt" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_dt" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
